task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Antibody Pair Optimization' experiment is created within the 'ELISA Assay Development - IL-6' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the experiment name 'Antibody Pair Optimization' under the project 'ELISA Assay Development - IL-6' in the SciNote interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the four required tasks are created in the experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for task cards or nodes named 'Plate Coating', 'Sample Dilution', 'Primary Antibody Incubation', and 'Signal Detection' within the experiment workflow.

task_completion.description: Verify that the four tasks are connected in the correct sequential order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for arrows connecting the tasks in this exact order: Plate Coating -> Sample Dilution -> Primary Antibody Incubation -> Signal Detection.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Plate Coating' task contains a protocol with at least 5 steps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the 'Plate Coating' task details for a protocol list showing 5 or more distinct numbered steps.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Volume (mL)' and 'Storage Temperature' columns are added to the 'ELISA Consumables' inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'ELISA Consumables' inventory table headers to confirm the presence of 'Volume (mL)' and 'Storage Temperature' columns.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three specified items are recorded in the inventory with their correct supplier and catalog numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for rows in the 'ELISA Consumables' inventory containing 'IL-6 Capture Antibody' (MAB206), 'IL-6 Detection Antibody' (BAF206), and 'Streptavidin-HRP' (DY998), all with 'R&D Systems' as the supplier.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the SciNote graphical user interface to complete the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SciNote web application being interacted with in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the outputs are within the actual SciNote ELN application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match SciNote's standard layout (menus, workflow canvas, tables), not a text editor or a generic spreadsheet.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing SQL commands or database client interfaces.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected project is 'ELISA Assay Development - IL-6' and the experiment is 'Antibody Pair Optimization'. The workflow tasks must be exactly: 'Plate Coating' -> 'Sample Dilution' -> 'Primary Antibody Incubation' -> 'Signal Detection'. The 'Plate Coating' task must have a protocol with >= 5 steps. The inventory 'ELISA Consumables' must have new columns 'Volume (mL)' and 'Storage Temperature'. The expected items are 'IL-6 Capture Antibody' (Catalog: MAB206), 'IL-6 Detection Antibody' (Catalog: BAF206), and 'Streptavidin-HRP' (Catalog: DY998), all from Supplier 'R&D Systems'.
